h1.visual_description: Bold, numbered, sans-serif font, slightly larger than body text.
h1.example_text: 1. Shipping as a vector for marine IAS

h2.visual_description: Bold and italicized sans-serif font, used for secondary headings or important notes.
h2.example_text: List of Philippine Ports is in Appendix 3

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption, rendered in a smaller, blue, italicized font below images.
In-text academic citation in author-date format.
Scientific binomial nomenclature (genus and species) rendered in italics.
Page number located at the bottom right margin.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Isolated page numbers at the bottom right corner of the page.
